mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_ID AS groupId, NAME AS name, LEADER_ID AS leaderId, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, DURATION AS duration, DESCRIPTION AS description, MAX_MEMBER AS maxMember, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT + DURATION) AS endDate, CASE WHEN (CREATED_AT + DURATION) < SYSDATE THEN '종료됨' ELSE '모집 중' END AS status FROM STUDY_GROUP ORDER BY GROUP_ID DESC

SELECT GROUP_ID AS groupId, NAME AS name, LEADER_ID AS leaderId, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt, DURATION AS duration, DESCRIPTION AS description, MAX_MEMBER AS maxMember FROM STUDY_GROUP WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDY_GROUP (GROUP_ID, NAME, LEADER_ID, CREATED_AT, DURATION) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{name}, #{leaderId}, SYSDATE, #{duration})
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDY_GROUP SET NAME = #{name}, LEADER_ID = #{leaderId}, DURATION = #{duration}, DESCRIPTION = #{description} WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_ID AS groupId, NAME AS name, LEADER_ID AS leaderId, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt, DURATION AS duration, DESCRIPTION AS description, MAX_MEMBER AS maxMember FROM STUDY_GROUP WHERE LEADER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT sg.*, u.nickname AS leader_nickname FROM study_group sg JOIN users u ON sg.leader_id = u.user_id WHERE sg.group_id = #{groupId}

SELECT G.GROUP_ID AS groupId, G.NAME AS name, G.LEADER_ID AS leaderId, TO_CHAR(G.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, G.DURATION AS duration, G.DESCRIPTION AS description, G.MAX_MEMBER AS maxMember, TO_CHAR(G.CREATED_AT + G.DURATION) AS endDate FROM STUDY_GROUP G JOIN STUDY_MEMBER M ON G.GROUP_ID = M.GROUP_ID WHERE M.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT sm.*, u.nickname FROM study_member sm JOIN users u ON sm.user_id = u.user_id WHERE sm.group_id = #{groupId}
SELECT GROUP_ID AS groupId, USER_ID AS userId, JOIN_DATE AS joinedAt FROM STUDY_MEMBER WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDY_MEMBER (GROUP_ID, USER_ID, JOIN_DATE) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM STUDY_MEMBER WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM STUDY_MEMBER WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_ID AS groupId, NAME AS name, LEADER_ID AS leaderId, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt, DURATION AS duration, DESCRIPTION AS description, MAX_MEMBER AS maxMember, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT + DURATION) AS endDate FROM STUDY_GROUP WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDY_MEMBER WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
